name: Vardhini Vastu — Verified Client Case Studies
description: Documented outcomes from Vastu consultations by Raghavendrra Hebbur at Vardhini Vastu. All outcomes are based on client-reported results and tracked follow-ups.

caseStudies.issue: Stagnant business growth, team conflict, poor client retention despite good product
caseStudies.vastu_diagnosis: South-East entrance with fire zone conflict; north zone blocked by heavy storage; founder's desk facing south (energy-draining direction)
remedies_applied: Entrance energy correction using copper threshold elements
North zone decluttered and activated with water element
Founder desk repositioned to north-east-facing orientation
Finance corner activated in south-east zone
caseStudies.outcome: 150% business growth within two quarters of implementation

caseStudies.issue: Chronic health issues, disturbed sleep, frequent arguments, financial stress
caseStudies.vastu_diagnosis: Master bedroom in south-east fire zone; kitchen in north-east causing health conflicts; children's study area in inauspicious south zone
remedies_applied: Bed repositioned within master bedroom to south-west wall orientation
Kitchen elements balanced using earth-element placements
Children's study table repositioned to north-east corner
Main entrance energised with prescribed threshold elements
caseStudies.outcome: Family reported improved sleep quality within 3 weeks; health issues reduced within 45 days; financial situation improved over 3 months

metrics.health_symptoms: 60%+ reduction in reported symptoms by day 45

caseStudies.issue: High defect rate, worker absenteeism, machinery breakdowns, poor profitability
caseStudies.vastu_diagnosis: Production area in water zone (causing flow problems); raw material storage blocking north magnetic zone; fire zone (south-east) underutilised
remedies_applied: Raw material storage moved from north to south-west zone
Production flow realigned with directional energy
Leadership cabin repositioned to south-west command position
Worker rest area shifted to north-west zone
caseStudies.outcome: 14% waste reduction within 90 days; 22% improvement in operational throughput; worker absenteeism reduced

caseStudies.issue: Low footfall despite good location, slow inventory movement, cash flow problems
caseStudies.vastu_diagnosis: Cash counter in south zone (loss direction for finances); entrance attractors absent; north zone cluttered blocking prosperity energy
remedies_applied: Cash counter relocated to north zone
Entrance enhanced with welcoming elements
North display area activated with products that generate maximum margin
Mirror placement to expand north zone visual energy
caseStudies.outcome: 22% improvement in customer engagement within 30 days; inventory movement improved; cash flow normalised

caseStudies.issue: Wanted to ensure new construction aligned with Vastu from foundation stage
caseStudies.vastu_diagnosis: Pre-construction analysis revealed proposed master bedroom in north-east (incorrect); entrance planned facing west-south-west (inauspicious degree range); kitchen planned in north-west
remedies_applied: Master bedroom relocated to south-west zone in revised floor plan
Entrance adjusted to north-east facing within same plot orientation
Kitchen confirmed in south-east fire zone
Pooja room placed in north-east per classical guidelines
Bore well placement guided to north-east water zone
caseStudies.outcome: Client completed construction with 100% Vastu compliance without any structural compromise; reported positive energy since occupation

metrics.post_occupation_experience: Positive — no issues reported at 6-month check-in
